scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/apply-browser-manifest.js chrome dist
scripts.build:edge: vite build --outDir dist-edge && node scripts/apply-browser-manifest.js edge dist-edge
scripts.build:firefox: vite build --outDir dist-firefox && node scripts/apply-browser-manifest.js firefox dist-firefox
scripts.pack:firefox: mkdir -p release && (cd dist-firefox && zip -r ../release/youran-tab-firefox.zip . -x '.DS_Store' '*/.DS_Store') && bun run pack:source
scripts.release: bun run build && bun run pack && bun run build:edge && bun run pack:edge && bun run build:firefox && bun run pack:firefox
